science.title: Scientists catch antimatter “atom” acting like a wave for the first time
science.summary: Quantum physics once shocked scientists by revealing that particles can behave like waves—and now, that strange behavior has been pushed even further. science.title: MIT Laser Breakthrough Lets Scientists Watch Drugs Enter the Brain in Real Time
science.summary: MIT researchers found that chaotic laser light can transform into a precise, stable beam. This breakthrough enables much faster, high-resolution imaging of how drugs move into the brain. science.title: Harvard Breakthrough Brings Powerful UV Light Sources Onto a Chip
science.summary: Scientists have achieved a major step toward chip-scale ultraviolet light by converting red light into powerful UV within a tiny photonic device. science.title: Oxford physicists achieve first-ever “quadsqueezing” breakthrough in quantum physics
science.summary: Scientists have created a powerful new way to control quantum systems, achieving the first-ever demonstration of quadsqueezing—an elusive fourth-order quantum effect. medicine.title: New treatment cuts bad cholesterol by nearly 50% without statins
medicine.summary: A new breakthrough could change how high cholesterol is treated, offering a powerful alternative to traditional drugs. medicine.title: A forgotten drug is giving new hope to kids with a rare disease
medicine.summary: A decades-old drug once used to treat sleeping sickness is now showing surprising promise against an ultra-rare and life-threatening genetic disorder called Bachmann-Bupp syndrome (BABS). medicine.title: Simple “gut reset” may stop weight gain after Ozempic or Wegovy

medicine.title: Hidden virus in your gut may be linked to colon cancer
medicine.summary: A newly discovered virus hiding inside a common gut bacterium could help explain one of medicine’s long-standing mysteries: why a microbe found in both healthy people and cancer patients is linked to colorectal cancer. medicine.title: Two common drugs may reverse fatty liver disease, study finds
medicine.summary: Scientists have discovered that combining two existing drugs can dramatically reduce liver fat linked to a common and often silent disease.
